title: Laptop Pro X1 - Full Specifications
content:
## Laptop Pro X1 Specifications

**Processor:** Intel Core i9-14900H (14 cores, 20 threads, up to 5.8GHz)
**Memory:** 32GB DDR5-5600MHz (2 SODIMM slots, upgradable to 64GB)
**Storage:** 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD (second M.2 slot available for expansion)
**Display:** 15.6" 4K OLED (3840x2160), 100% DCI-P3, 500 nits, 120Hz refresh rate
**Graphics:** NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 8GB GDDR6
**Battery:** 86Wh lithium-polymer, up to 12 hours battery life
**OS:** Windows 11 Pro (downgrade to Windows 10 Pro available)
**Ports:** 2x Thunderbolt 4, 1x USB-C 3.2, 2x USB-A 3.2, 1x HDMI 2.1, 1x SD card reader, 1x 3.5mm audio combo
**Wireless:** Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax tri-band), Bluetooth 5.3
**Camera:** 1080p IR camera with Windows Hello facial recognition
**Audio:** Quad speakers with Dolby Atmos, dual array microphones
**Keyboard:** Full-size backlit keyboard with 1.5mm key travel, fingerprint reader in power button
**Dimensions:** 355 x 237 x 17.9 mm
**Weight:** 1.8 kg (3.97 lbs)
**Color:** Space Gray
**In the box:** Laptop, 140W USB-C charger, quick start guide, warranty card

**5G Support:** No, the Laptop Pro X1 does not have built-in 5G connectivity. It supports Wi-Fi 6E for wireless internet.

title: Wireless Earbuds Z5 - Full Specifications
content:
## Wireless Earbuds Z5 Specifications

**Driver:** Custom 11mm dynamic driver with titanium-coated diaphragm
**Frequency Response:** 20Hz - 40kHz (Hi-Res Audio certified by JAS)
**Bluetooth:** Version 5.3 with SBC, AAC, LDAC codecs
**ANC:** Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation, up to -35dB reduction
**Transparency Mode:** Full ambient sound passthrough with adjustable levels
**Battery (Earbuds):** 8 hours with ANC on, 10 hours with ANC off
**Battery (Case):** 32 hours additional charge (40 hours total)
**Quick Charge:** 10 minutes charging = 2 hours playback
**Charging:** USB-C wired, Qi wireless charging compatible
**Water Resistance:** IPX5 (earbuds), IPX4 (charging case)
**Microphones:** 6 total (3 per earbud) with AI-powered noise reduction for calls
**Controls:** Capacitive touch with customizable gestures via app
**Multipoint:** Connect to 2 devices simultaneously
**Weight:** 5.2g per earbud, 48g charging case
**Ear Tips:** 4 sizes included (XS, S, M, L) - silicone
**Colors:** Midnight Black, Pearl White
**In the box:** Earbuds, charging case, USB-C cable, 4 pairs of ear tips, quick start guide

**Compatibility:** Works with any Bluetooth-enabled device. Companion app available for iOS and Android.

title: Smart Watch S3 - Full Specifications
content:
## Smart Watch S3 Specifications

**Display:** 1.43" AMOLED, 466x466 resolution, 600 nits peak brightness, Always-On Display
**Processor:** Dual-core ARM Cortex-M33
**Storage:** 32GB internal (for music, apps, watch faces)
**Sensors:** Optical heart rate (PPG), SpO2 (blood oxygen), accelerometer, gyroscope, barometric altimeter, compass, ambient light, skin temperature
**GPS:** Dual-frequency GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou
**Water Resistance:** 5ATM (suitable for swimming up to 50m depth)
**Battery:** 410mAh, up to 7 days typical use, 14 days battery saver mode
**Charging:** Magnetic wireless charging, 0-100% in approximately 2 hours
**Connectivity:** Bluetooth 5.2, Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n, NFC for contactless payments
**Sport Modes:** 100+ modes with auto-detection for walking, running, cycling, swimming
**Health Features:** 24/7 heart rate monitoring, SpO2, stress tracking, sleep analysis (REM, deep, light), menstrual cycle tracking, body temperature monitoring
**Smart Features:** Notifications, quick replies, music control, camera remote, weather, alarms, timers, find my phone
**Compatibility:** iOS 14+ / Android 8+
**Strap:** 22mm quick-release, silicone (additional leather and metal straps sold separately)
**Dimensions:** 46.5 x 46.5 x 11mm
**Weight:** 37g without strap
**Colors:** Graphite Black, Silver, Rose Gold

title: Portable Speaker M8 - Full Specifications
content:
## Portable Speaker M8 Specifications

**Drivers:** 2x 52mm full-range drivers + 2x passive bass radiators
**Output Power:** 20W peak (10W x 2)
**Frequency Response:** 60Hz - 20kHz
**Bluetooth:** Version 5.3 with SBC, AAC codec support
**Range:** Up to 30 meters (100 feet) open air
**Battery:** 5000mAh lithium-polymer, up to 20 hours playback at 50% volume
**Charging:** USB-C (approximately 3 hours for full charge)
**Water Resistance:** IPX7 (submersible up to 1 meter for 30 minutes)
**Stereo Pairing:** Yes, connect two M8 speakers for true stereo
**Speakerphone:** Built-in microphone with echo cancellation
**Dimensions:** 180 x 72 x 72 mm (cylindrical)
**Weight:** 540g (1.19 lbs)
**Materials:** Recycled plastic body, rubberized exterior, metal grille
**Colors:** Ocean Blue, Forest Green, Sunset Orange, Charcoal Black, Sand White
**In the box:** Speaker, USB-C cable, carabiner clip, quick start guide

**Note:** Does not support Wi-Fi or voice assistants. Audio input is Bluetooth only (no AUX cable).

title: 4K Monitor U27 - Full Specifications
content:
## 4K Monitor U27 Specifications

**Panel:** 27" IPS (In-Plane Switching)
**Resolution:** 3840 x 2160 (4K UHD), 163 PPI
**Refresh Rate:** 144Hz via DisplayPort, 120Hz via HDMI
**Response Time:** 1ms GtG (Gray to Gray)
**HDR:** VESA DisplayHDR 600 certified
**Brightness:** 450 nits typical, 600 nits peak (HDR)
**Contrast:** 1000:1 native
**Color Gamut:** 99% sRGB, 95% DCI-P3, Delta E < 2 (factory calibrated)
**Adaptive Sync:** AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, NVIDIA G-Sync Compatible
**Ports:** 1x DisplayPort 1.4, 2x HDMI 2.1, 1x USB-C (65W Power Delivery + video + data), 4x USB-A 3.0 downstream hub, 1x 3.5mm audio out
**KVM Switch:** Built-in, switch between two computers with one keyboard/mouse
**PIP/PBP:** Picture-in-Picture and Picture-by-Picture support
**Speakers:** 2x 3W built-in
**Stand Adjustments:** Height (130mm), Tilt (-5/+20), Swivel (+-30), Pivot (90)
**VESA Mount:** 100 x 100 mm
**Dimensions (with stand):** 614 x 533 x 230 mm
**Dimensions (without stand):** 614 x 365 x 55 mm
**Weight:** 5.8 kg without stand, 8.2 kg with stand

**Note:** The USB-C port supports both video output AND 65W laptop charging over a single cable.

title: Mechanical Keyboard K7 - Full Specifications
content:
## Mechanical Keyboard K7 Specifications

**Switch:** Gateron Pro 3.0 Yellow (linear, 50g actuation, pre-lubed, hot-swappable 3/5 pin)
**Keycaps:** PBT double-shot, Cherry profile
**Layout:** 75% compact (82 keys), ANSI
**Connectivity:** Bluetooth 5.1 (up to 3 devices), 2.4GHz wireless dongle, USB-C wired
**Battery:** 4000mAh Li-Po rechargeable
**Battery Life:** Up to 200 hours (RGB off), approximately 30 hours (RGB on at 50%)
**Polling Rate:** 1000Hz (wired and 2.4GHz), 125Hz (Bluetooth)
**Anti-ghosting:** N-key rollover (wired), 6-key rollover (wireless)
**Backlight:** Per-key RGB, 16.8 million colors, 20+ preset effects, customizable via software
**LEDs:** South-facing (no interference with Cherry-profile keycaps)
**Mounting:** Gasket mount with silicone dampening pads and IXPE foam
**Stabilizers:** Pre-lubed screw-in PCB-mount stabilizers
**Knob:** Aluminum rotary encoder (volume by default, programmable)
**Dimensions:** 332 x 145 x 33 mm (front height 22mm without feet)
**Weight:** 820g (1.81 lbs)
**Cable:** Detachable USB-C to USB-A braided cable (1.8m)
**Compatibility:** Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android
**Software:** TechNova Keyboard Studio (Windows/macOS) for key remapping, macro, RGB customization
**In the box:** Keyboard, USB-C cable, 2.4GHz dongle, keycap puller, switch puller, extra switches x3, quick start guide
